results.title: 02-Chapter Land Use Dashboard
results.snippet: Dashboard was developed to support planning for potential residential and housing developments identified in the approved NN CLUP. Feasibility‑related spatial data is included to help guide land‑selection decisions. AECOM reviewed each Chapter Land Use Plan and documented key details, including: the plan name, date of creation, the firm responsible for preparing it, the availability of digital GIS data, notes on the GIS data, the availability of maps, notes on the maps, and whether the plan included any “New Housing Development Recommendations.”

results.title: 03-Property Damage Dashboard

results.title: 03-NHA Routing Data from DDTi
results.snippet: A web map presenting field data collected during GIS Phase 2 by Digital Data Technologies Inc. It features a wide range of traffic‑related information—including stop signs, yield signs, traffic signals, speed limits, mileposts, kilometer posts, and speed humps—along with additional assets such as landmarks, gates, cattle guards, and outhouses. The map also incorporates study area boundaries and roadway data from previous NHA inventories. Broader geographic layers are included as well, such as boundaries for the Navajo Nation, the Hopi Tribe, NN chapters and HMOs, and U.S. states, along with roadway networks and physical office locations for HMOs.

results.title: 01-General Boundaries
results.snippet: A web map designed for everyday use. It includes boundary data for the Navajo Nation and its chapters, HMO offices, subdivisions, and the Hopi Tribe boundary, along with dwelling unit locations and road networks.

results.title: NHA Stakeholders Basemap
results.snippet: A web-based map that visualizes jurisdictional boundaries for the Navajo Nation Council, as well as Congressional and State Delegate districts across the Navajo Nation. Used within the four stakeholder dashboards.
